<!--StartFragment--><h1 data-section-id="agcc0n" data-start="0" data-end="69" class="PDq2pG_selectionAnchorContainer"><span role="text"><strong data-start="2" data-end="69">Engineering, Computer Science, and Mathematics Formula Handbook</strong></span><span aria-hidden="true" class="PDq2pG_selectionAnchor"></span></h1>
<h2 data-section-id="13ax1s5" data-start="71" data-end="86">Introduction</h2>
<p data-start="88" data-end="751">Mathematical formulas play a fundamental role in engineering, computer science, artificial intelligence, physics, and statistics. They provide precise methods for solving problems, analyzing systems, evaluating performance, and designing efficient algorithms. Whether calculating the execution time of a computer process, determining the efficiency of an electrical machine, training a neural network, or measuring statistical variation, mathematical equations form the backbone of scientific and technological advancements. This report presents a collection of commonly used formulas from various disciplines along with a brief explanation of their significance.</p>
<hr data-start="753" data-end="756">
<h1 data-section-id="xgsgjz" data-start="758" data-end="805" class="">1. Software Engineering and Operating Systems</h1>
<p data-start="807" data-end="949">Software engineering and operating systems rely on performance metrics to evaluate process scheduling, CPU utilization, and system efficiency.</p>
<h3 data-section-id="owkoul" data-start="951" data-end="970">Turnaround Time</h3>
<p data-start="972" data-end="1087">Turnaround time represents the total time taken for a process to complete execution after it arrives in the system.</p>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mtext>Turnaround&nbsp;Time</mtext><mo>=</mo><mtext>Completion&nbsp;Time</mtext><mo>−</mo><mtext>Arrival&nbsp;Time</mtext></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">\text{Turnaround Time} = \text{Completion Time} - \text{Arrival Time}</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">Turnaround&nbsp;Time</span></span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">Completion&nbsp;Time</span></span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mbin">−</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">Arrival&nbsp;Time</span></span></span></span></span></span>
<h3 data-section-id="tdya2g" data-start="1166" data-end="1182">Waiting Time</h3>
<p data-start="1184" data-end="1280">Waiting time is the total duration a process spends waiting in the ready queue before execution.</p>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mtext>Waiting&nbsp;Time</mtext><mo>=</mo><mtext>Turnaround&nbsp;Time</mtext><mo>−</mo><mtext>Burst&nbsp;Time</mtext></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">\text{Waiting Time} = \text{Turnaround Time} - \text{Burst Time}</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">Waiting&nbsp;Time</span></span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">Turnaround&nbsp;Time</span></span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mbin">−</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">Burst&nbsp;Time</span></span></span></span></span></span>
<h3 data-section-id="12rlxzk" data-start="1354" data-end="1371" class="">Response Time</h3>
<p data-start="1373" data-end="1456">Response time measures how quickly a process receives CPU attention after arriving.</p>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mtext>Response&nbsp;Time</mtext><mo>=</mo><mtext>First&nbsp;Response&nbsp;Time</mtext><mo>−</mo><mtext>Arrival&nbsp;Time</mtext></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">\text{Response Time} = \text{First Response Time} - \text{Arrival Time}</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">Response&nbsp;Time</span></span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">First&nbsp;Response&nbsp;Time</span></span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mbin">−</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">Arrival&nbsp;Time</span></span></span></span></span></span>
<h3 data-section-id="vp1wy2" data-start="1537" data-end="1556" class="">CPU Utilization</h3>
<p data-start="1558" data-end="1628">CPU utilization indicates how efficiently the processor is being used.</p>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mtext>CPU&nbsp;Utilization</mtext><mo>=</mo><mfrac><mtext>CPU&nbsp;Busy&nbsp;Time</mtext><mtext>Total&nbsp;Time</mtext></mfrac><mo>×</mo><mn>100</mn><mi mathvariant="normal">%</mi></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">\text{CPU Utilization}
=
\frac{\text{CPU Busy Time}}
{\text{Total Time}}
\times100\%</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">CPU&nbsp;Utilization</span></span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mopen nulldelimiter"></span><span class="mfrac"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">Total&nbsp;Time</span></span></span></span><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="frac-line"></span></span><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">CPU&nbsp;Busy&nbsp;Time</span></span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mclose nulldelimiter"></span></span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mbin">×</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord">100%</span></span></span></span></span>
<h3 data-section-id="18mgb1o" data-start="1722" data-end="1736" class="">Throughput</h3>
<p data-start="1738" data-end="1810">Throughput measures the number of processes completed in a unit of time.</p>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mtext>Throughput</mtext><mo>=</mo><mfrac><mtext>Number&nbsp;of&nbsp;Processes</mtext><mtext>Total&nbsp;Time</mtext></mfrac></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">\text{Throughput}
=
\frac{\text{Number of Processes}}
{\text{Total Time}}</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">Throughput</span></span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mopen nulldelimiter"></span><span class="mfrac"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">Total&nbsp;Time</span></span></span></span><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="frac-line"></span></span><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">Number&nbsp;of&nbsp;Processes</span></span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mclose nulldelimiter"></span></span></span></span></span></span>
<h3 data-section-id="h9jim2" data-start="1893" data-end="1918" class="">Effective Access Time</h3>
<p data-start="1920" data-end="1998">This formula estimates the average memory access time considering page faults.</p>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>E</mi><mi>A</mi><mi>T</mi><mo>=</mo><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mn>1</mn><mo>−</mo><mi>p</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo><mi>m</mi><mo>+</mo><mi>p</mi><mi>P</mi></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">EAT
=
(1-p)m+pP</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">E</span><span class="mord mathnormal">A</span><span class="mord mathnormal">T</span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord">1</span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mbin">−</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">p</span><span class="mclose">)</span><span class="mord mathnormal">m</span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mbin">+</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">pP</span></span></span></span></span>
<p data-start="2023" data-end="2029">where:</p>
<ul data-start="2031" data-end="2126">
<li data-section-id="rvilmx" data-start="2031" data-end="2059">
<span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><semantics><mrow><mi>m</mi></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">m</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">m</span></span></span></span> = memory access time
</li>
<li data-section-id="12l695h" data-start="2060" data-end="2093">
<span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><semantics><mrow><mi>P</mi></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">P</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">P</span></span></span></span> = page fault service time
</li>
<li data-section-id="kuat2o" data-start="2094" data-end="2126">
<span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><semantics><mrow><mi>p</mi></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">p</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">p</span></span></span></span> = page fault probability
</li>
</ul>
<h3 data-section-id="yfiock" data-start="2128" data-end="2139">Speedup</h3>
<p data-start="2141" data-end="2207">Speedup compares the execution time before and after optimization.</p>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>S</mi><mo>=</mo><mfrac><mtext>Old&nbsp;Execution&nbsp;Time</mtext><mtext>New&nbsp;Execution&nbsp;Time</mtext></mfrac></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">S
=
\frac{\text{Old Execution Time}}
{\text{New Execution Time}}</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">S</span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mopen nulldelimiter"></span><span class="mfrac"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">New&nbsp;Execution&nbsp;Time</span></span></span></span><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="frac-line"></span></span><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">Old&nbsp;Execution&nbsp;Time</span></span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mclose nulldelimiter"></span></span></span></span></span></span>
<hr data-start="2281" data-end="2284">
<h1 data-section-id="1bpli4w" data-start="2286" data-end="2308">2. Computer Networks</h1>
<p data-start="2310" data-end="2415">Computer networks use mathematical formulas to evaluate communication delays and transmission efficiency.</p>
<h3 data-section-id="12s4qjp" data-start="2417" data-end="2439">Transmission Delay</h3>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><msub><mi>T</mi><mi>t</mi></msub><mo>=</mo><mfrac><mi>L</mi><mi>R</mi></mfrac></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">T_t
=
\frac{L}{R}</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal">T</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">t</span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mopen nulldelimiter"></span><span class="mfrac"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal">R</span></span></span><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="frac-line"></span></span><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal">L</span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mclose nulldelimiter"></span></span></span></span></span></span>
<p data-start="2466" data-end="2472">where:</p>
<ul data-start="2474" data-end="2523">
<li data-section-id="oacs45" data-start="2474" data-end="2495">
<span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><semantics><mrow><mi>L</mi></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">L</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">L</span></span></span></span> = packet size
</li>
<li data-section-id="1expp76" data-start="2496" data-end="2523">
<span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><semantics><mrow><mi>R</mi></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">R</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">R</span></span></span></span> = transmission rate
</li>
</ul>
<h3 data-section-id="1xftzlh" data-start="2525" data-end="2546">Propagation Delay</h3>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><msub><mi>T</mi><mi>p</mi></msub><mo>=</mo><mfrac><mi>d</mi><mi>v</mi></mfrac></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">T_p
=
\frac{d}{v}</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal">T</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">p</span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mopen nulldelimiter"></span><span class="mfrac"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal">v</span></span></span><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="frac-line"></span></span><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal">d</span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mclose nulldelimiter"></span></span></span></span></span></span>
<p data-start="2573" data-end="2579">where:</p>
<ul data-start="2581" data-end="2640">
<li data-section-id="3uq551" data-start="2581" data-end="2612">
<span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><semantics><mrow><mi>d</mi></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">d</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">d</span></span></span></span> = transmission distance
</li>
<li data-section-id="138e09v" data-start="2613" data-end="2640">
<span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><semantics><mrow><mi>v</mi></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">v</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">v</span></span></span></span> = propagation speed
</li>
</ul>
<h3 data-section-id="18dbxu7" data-start="2642" data-end="2665">Total Network Delay</h3>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>D</mi><mo>=</mo><msub><mi>T</mi><mi>t</mi></msub><mo>+</mo><msub><mi>T</mi><mi>p</mi></msub><mo>+</mo><msub><mi>T</mi><mi>q</mi></msub><mo>+</mo><msub><mi>T</mi><mrow><mi>p</mi><mi>r</mi><mi>o</mi><mi>c</mi></mrow></msub></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">D
=
T_t
+
T_p
+
T_q
+
T_{proc}</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">D</span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal">T</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">t</span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mbin">+</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal">T</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">p</span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mbin">+</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal">T</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">q</span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mbin">+</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal">T</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">p</span><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">roc</span></span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span>
<p data-start="2705" data-end="2711">where:</p>
<ul data-start="2713" data-end="2773">
<li data-section-id="r80uei" data-start="2713" data-end="2739">
<span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><semantics><mrow><msub><mi>T</mi><mi>q</mi></msub></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">T_q</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal">T</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">q</span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span> = queueing delay
</li>
<li data-section-id="1s7dmbt" data-start="2740" data-end="2773">
<span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><semantics><mrow><msub><mi>T</mi><mrow><mi>p</mi><mi>r</mi><mi>o</mi><mi>c</mi></mrow></msub></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">T_{proc}</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal">T</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">p</span><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">roc</span></span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span> = processing delay
</li>
</ul>
<h3 data-section-id="djrq9v" data-start="2775" data-end="2800">Bandwidth Utilization</h3>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>U</mi><mo>=</mo><mfrac><mtext>Useful&nbsp;Data</mtext><mtext>Total&nbsp;Bandwidth</mtext></mfrac></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">U
=
\frac{\text{Useful Data}}
{\text{Total Bandwidth}}</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">U</span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mopen nulldelimiter"></span><span class="mfrac"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">Total&nbsp;Bandwidth</span></span></span></span><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="frac-line"></span></span><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">Useful&nbsp;Data</span></span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mclose nulldelimiter"></span></span></span></span></span></span>
<hr data-start="2864" data-end="2867">
<h1 data-section-id="2idg14" data-start="2869" data-end="2890">3. Database Systems</h1>
<p data-start="2892" data-end="2971">Database systems use disk performance formulas to estimate data retrieval time.</p>
<h3 data-section-id="mfp7eq" data-start="2973" data-end="2993">Disk Access Time</h3>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>T</mi><mo>=</mo><msub><mi>T</mi><mi>s</mi></msub><mo>+</mo><msub><mi>T</mi><mi>r</mi></msub><mo>+</mo><msub><mi>T</mi><mi>t</mi></msub></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">T
=
T_s
+
T_r
+
T_t</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">T</span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal">T</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">s</span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mbin">+</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal">T</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">r</span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mbin">+</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal">T</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">t</span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span>
<p data-start="3022" data-end="3028">where:</p>
<ul data-start="3030" data-end="3108">
<li data-section-id="1pg3kch" data-start="3030" data-end="3051">
<span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><semantics><mrow><msub><mi>T</mi><mi>s</mi></msub></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">T_s</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal">T</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">s</span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span> = seek time
</li>
<li data-section-id="1ijm78c" data-start="3052" data-end="3082">
<span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><semantics><mrow><msub><mi>T</mi><mi>r</mi></msub></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">T_r</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal">T</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">r</span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span> = rotational latency
</li>
<li data-section-id="na12qd" data-start="3083" data-end="3108">
<span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><semantics><mrow><msub><mi>T</mi><mi>t</mi></msub></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">T_t</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal">T</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">t</span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span> = transfer time
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="3110" data-end="3113">
<h1 data-section-id="s3ggx1" data-start="3115" data-end="3136">4. Software Testing</h1>
<p data-start="3138" data-end="3220">Software testing metrics help evaluate software quality and testing effectiveness.</p>
<h3 data-section-id="awm3fv" data-start="3222" data-end="3240">Defect Density</h3>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mtext>Defect&nbsp;Density</mtext><mo>=</mo><mfrac><mtext>Number&nbsp;of&nbsp;Defects</mtext><mtext>KLOC</mtext></mfrac></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">\text{Defect Density}
=
\frac{\text{Number of Defects}}
{\text{KLOC}}</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">Defect&nbsp;Density</span></span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mopen nulldelimiter"></span><span class="mfrac"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">KLOC</span></span></span></span><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="frac-line"></span></span><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">Number&nbsp;of&nbsp;Defects</span></span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mclose nulldelimiter"></span></span></span></span></span></span>
<h3 data-section-id="16ftr8e" data-start="3319" data-end="3336">Test Coverage</h3>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mtext>Coverage</mtext><mo>=</mo><mfrac><mtext>Executed&nbsp;Statements</mtext><mtext>Total&nbsp;Statements</mtext></mfrac><mo>×</mo><mn>100</mn><mi mathvariant="normal">%</mi></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">\text{Coverage}
=
\frac{\text{Executed Statements}}
{\text{Total Statements}}
\times100\%</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">Coverage</span></span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mopen nulldelimiter"></span><span class="mfrac"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">Total&nbsp;Statements</span></span></span></span><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="frac-line"></span></span><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">Executed&nbsp;Statements</span></span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mclose nulldelimiter"></span></span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mbin">×</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord">100%</span></span></span></span></span>
<h3 data-section-id="6v7e96" data-start="3435" data-end="3464">Defect Removal Efficiency</h3>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>D</mi><mi>R</mi><mi>E</mi><mo>=</mo><mfrac><mtext>Defects&nbsp;Removed</mtext><mtext>Total&nbsp;Defects</mtext></mfrac><mo>×</mo><mn>100</mn><mi mathvariant="normal">%</mi></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">DRE
=
\frac{\text{Defects Removed}}
{\text{Total Defects}}
\times100\%</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">D</span><span class="mord mathnormal">RE</span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mopen nulldelimiter"></span><span class="mfrac"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">Total&nbsp;Defects</span></span></span></span><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="frac-line"></span></span><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">Defects&nbsp;Removed</span></span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mclose nulldelimiter"></span></span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mbin">×</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord">100%</span></span></span></span></span>
<hr data-start="3544" data-end="3547">
<h1 data-section-id="ypy6jw" data-start="3549" data-end="3569">5. Compiler Design</h1>
<p data-start="3571" data-end="3631">Compiler optimization often measures compression efficiency.</p>
<h3 data-section-id="dtop9l" data-start="3633" data-end="3654">Compression Ratio</h3>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>C</mi><mi>R</mi><mo>=</mo><mfrac><mtext>Original&nbsp;Size</mtext><mtext>Compressed&nbsp;Size</mtext></mfrac></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">CR
=
\frac{\text{Original Size}}
{\text{Compressed Size}}</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">CR</span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mopen nulldelimiter"></span><span class="mfrac"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">Compressed&nbsp;Size</span></span></span></span><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="frac-line"></span></span><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">Original&nbsp;Size</span></span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mclose nulldelimiter"></span></span></span></span></span></span>
<hr data-start="3721" data-end="3724">
<h1 data-section-id="oqoyvh" data-start="3726" data-end="3754">6. Artificial Intelligence</h1>
<p data-start="3756" data-end="3868">Artificial intelligence algorithms heavily depend on mathematical activation functions and optimization methods.</p>
<h3 data-section-id="1qwcw46" data-start="3870" data-end="3890">Sigmoid Function</h3>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>σ</mi><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>x</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo><mo>=</mo><mfrac><mn>1</mn><mrow><mn>1</mn><mo>+</mo><msup><mi>e</mi><mrow><mo>−</mo><mi>x</mi></mrow></msup></mrow></mfrac></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">\sigma(x)
=
\frac1{1+e^{-x}}</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">σ</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal">x</span><span class="mclose">)</span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mopen nulldelimiter"></span><span class="mfrac"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord">1</span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mbin">+</span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal">e</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mtight"><span class="mord mtight">−</span><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">x</span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="frac-line"></span></span><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord">1</span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mclose nulldelimiter"></span></span></span></span></span></span>
<h3 data-section-id="e23zz2" data-start="3928" data-end="3956">ReLU Activation Function</h3>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>f</mi><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>x</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo><mo>=</mo><mi>max</mi><mo>⁡</mo><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mn>0</mn><mo separator="true">,</mo><mi>x</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">f(x)
=
\max(0,x)</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">f</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal">x</span><span class="mclose">)</span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mop">max</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord">0</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">x</span><span class="mclose">)</span></span></span></span></span>
<h3 data-section-id="1b7f1ku" data-start="3982" data-end="4002">Softmax Function</h3>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><msub><mi>P</mi><mi>i</mi></msub><mo>=</mo><mfrac><msup><mi>e</mi><msub><mi>x</mi><mi>i</mi></msub></msup><mrow><munder><mo>∑</mo><mi>j</mi></munder><msup><mi>e</mi><msub><mi>x</mi><mi>j</mi></msub></msup></mrow></mfrac></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">P_i
=
\frac{e^{x_i}}
{\sum_j e^{x_j}}</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal">P</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">i</span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mopen nulldelimiter"></span><span class="mfrac"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mop"><span class="mop op-symbol small-op">∑</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">j</span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal">e</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mtight"><span class="mord mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">x</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="sizing reset-size3 size1 mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">j</span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="frac-line"></span></span><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal">e</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mtight"><span class="mord mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">x</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="sizing reset-size3 size1 mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">i</span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mclose nulldelimiter"></span></span></span></span></span></span>
<h3 data-section-id="4wvzb0" data-start="4049" data-end="4071">Mean Squared Error</h3>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>M</mi><mi>S</mi><mi>E</mi><mo>=</mo><mfrac><mn>1</mn><mi>n</mi></mfrac><munderover><mo>∑</mo><mrow><mi>i</mi><mo>=</mo><mn>1</mn></mrow><mi>n</mi></munderover><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><msub><mi>y</mi><mi>i</mi></msub><mo>−</mo><msub><mover accent="true"><mi>y</mi><mo>^</mo></mover><mi>i</mi></msub><msup><mo stretchy="false">)</mo><mn>2</mn></msup></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">MSE
=
\frac1n
\sum_{i=1}^{n}
(y_i-\hat y_i)^2</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">MSE</span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mopen nulldelimiter"></span><span class="mfrac"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal">n</span></span></span><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="frac-line"></span></span><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord">1</span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mclose nulldelimiter"></span></span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mop op-limits"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">i</span><span class="mrel mtight">=</span><span class="mord mtight">1</span></span></span></span><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span><span class="mop op-symbol large-op">∑</span></span></span><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">n</span></span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal">y</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">i</span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mbin">−</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord accent"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span <h3 data-section-id="1sfwob4" data-start="4126" data-end="4148">Cross Entropy Loss</h3>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>L</mi><mo>=</mo><mo>−</mo><munder><mo>∑</mo><mi>i</mi></munder><msub><mi>y</mi><mi>i</mi></msub><mi>log</mi><mo>⁡</mo><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><msub><mover accent="true"><mi>y</mi><mo>^</mo></mover><mi>i</mi></msub><mo stretchy="false">)</mo></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">L
=
-\sum_i
y_i
\log(\hat y_i)</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">L</span><span <span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>μ</mi><mo>=</mo><mfrac><mn>1</mn><mi>n</mi></mfrac><munderover><mo>∑</mo><mrow><mi>i</mi><mo>=</mo><mn>1</mn></mrow><mi>n</mi></munderover><msub><mi>x</mi><mi>i</mi></msub></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">\mu

<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><msup><mi>σ</mi><mn>2</mn></msup><mo>=</mo><mfrac><mn>1</mn><mi>n</mi></mfrac><munderover><mo>∑</mo><mrow><mi>i</mi><mo>=</mo><mn>1</mn></mrow><mi>n</mi></munderover><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><msub><mi>x</mi><mi>i</mi></msub><mo>−</mo><mi>μ</mi><msup><mo stretchy="false">)</mo><mn>2</mn></msup></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">\sigma^2

<h1 data-section-id="1pg5kt7" data-start="4621" data-end="4645">8. Digital Electronics</h1>
<p data-start="4647" data-end="4715">Digital electronics relies on binary arithmetic and Boolean algebra.</p>
<h3 data-section-id="nj9mgx" data-start="4717" data-end="4749">Binary to Decimal Conversion</h3>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>N</mi><mo>=</mo><munder><mo>∑</mo><mi>i</mi></munder><msub><mi>b</mi><mi>i</mi></msub><msup><mn>2</mn><mi>i</mi></msup></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">N
=
\sum_i
b_i2^i</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">N</span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mop op-limits"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">i</span></span></span><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span><span class="mop op-symbol large-op">∑</span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal">b</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">i</span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span></span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord">2</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist"><span><span class="pstrut"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">i</span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span>
<h3 data-section-id="1711nzm" data-start="4776" data-end="4798">Boolean Identities</h3>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>A</mi><mo>+</mo><mi>A</mi><mo>=</mo><mi>A</mi></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">A+A=A</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">A</span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mbin">+</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">A</span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">A</span></span></span></span></span>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>A</mi><mo>⋅</mo><mn>1</mn><mo>=</mo><mi>A</mi></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">A\cdot1=A</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">A</span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mbin">⋅</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord">1</span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">A</span></span></span></span></span>

<h1 data-section-id="19du892" data-start="4848" data-end="4875" class="">9. Electrical Engineering</h1>
<p data-start="4877" data-end="4980">Electrical engineering formulas describe relationships between voltage, current, resistance, and power.</p>
<h3 data-section-id="a2xjmq" data-start="4982" data-end="4995">Ohm's Law</h3>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>V</mi><mo>=</mo><mi>I</mi><mi>R</mi></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">V
=
IR</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">V</span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">I</span><span class="mord mathnormal">R</span></span></span></span></span>
<h3 data-section-id="1iiu0ai" data-start="5011" data-end="5029">Electric Power</h3>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>P</mi><mo>=</mo><mi>V</mi><mi>I</mi></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">P
=
VI</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">P</span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">V</span><span class="mord mathnormal">I</span></span></span></span></span>
<h3 data-section-id="13blzq3" data-start="5045" data-end="5057">AC Power</h3>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>P</mi><mo>=</mo><mi>V</mi><mi>I</mi><mi>cos</mi><mo>⁡</mo><mi>ϕ</mi></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">P
=
VI\cos\phi</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">P</span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">V</span><span class="mord mathnormal">I</span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mop">cos</span><span class="mspace"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">ϕ</span></span></span></span></span>
<h3 data-section-id="17f113e" data-start="5081" data-end="5102">Electrical Energy</h3>
